# AI Lab Dashboard

AI Lab is a local-first workspace for reusable AI scientist task loops.

<div class="ai-lab-kpi">
  <div><strong>1</strong>active task</div>
  <div><strong>Git</strong>tracks task structure</div>
  <div><strong>local</strong>experiment logs</div>
  <div><strong>sync</strong>generated docs</div>
</div>

## Active Tasks

| Task | ID | Metric | Status |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [BTC Benchmark](task/btc-benchmark.md) | `btc_benchmark` | `referee_dev_score`, maximize | active |

## Artifact Policy

Repo Git tracks task descriptions, loop specs, scientist instructions, and maintained task infrastructure. Experiment code, results, plots, reports, assets, and run logs stay local under ignored task artifact directories.

## Common Commands

```bash
uv run python bin/ai-lab docs sync
uv run python bin/ai-lab task validate --all
uv run python bin/ai-lab task run btc_benchmark --once --dry-run
uv run python bin/ai-lab docs audit
```
